name: tamarind-mcp
description: Run 300+ Tamarind Bio protein and molecular-science tools through the authenticated MCP server — structure prediction, design, docking, and analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Predict structures, design binders, dock and screen molecules
interface.longDescription: Connect ChatGPT to your Tamarind Bio workspace for protein and molecular science. Validate, estimate, submit, and monitor jobs across 300+ tools — structure prediction, docking, protein and antibody design, molecular dynamics, and property prediction. Chain tools into pipelines, batch many inputs at once, and pull back structures, results, and logs — all from chat.
defaultPrompt: Dock a ligand to my receptor
Design 8 binders to receptor.pdb with RFdiffusion, run ProteinMPNN, then fold the top 3 with Chai
Predict solubility and thermostability for these five sequences
Predict ADME properties for my small-molecule candidates
Generate antibody variants for affinity maturation
Show my last 10 jobs and download the results from my BindCraft run
